title: Palo Alto Firewall Log Generator
description: Generates sample Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS log entries covering all four log families: TRAFFIC (allow/deny/drop), THREAT (vulnerability/spyware/wildfire/url/file), SYSTEM (HA, interface, config commit, GlobalProtect VPN), and CONFIG (admin audit). ~60% traffic, ~20% threat, ~12% system, ~8% config per run.

generate_palo_alto_logs.name: generate_palo_alto_logs
generate_palo_alto_logs.description: Runs a JavaScript action that builds sample Palo Alto PAN-OS 10.x log entries covering all four primary log families: TRAFFIC (allow/deny), THREAT (vulnerability/spyware/wildfire/url/file), SYSTEM (HA, interface, config commit, GP tunnel events), and CONFIG (admin audit). Also includes GlobalProtect VPN session events. Returns structured arrays per log type.

ingest_logs_to_grail.name: ingest_logs_to_grail
ingest_logs_to_grail.description: Sends all generated Palo Alto log lines (TRAFFIC, THREAT, SYSTEM, CONFIG) to the Dynatrace Log Ingest API v2. Each log type gets appropriate structured attributes for DQL filtering.

analyze_blocked_traffic.name: analyze_blocked_traffic
analyze_blocked_traffic.description: Analyzes the generated log lines across all 4 log types (TRAFFIC, THREAT, SYSTEM, CONFIG) and produces a validation report.
